title: Darlon
content:

{{Quote|Senators Char Bibbeck (Colunda Prime) and Jonas Wallen (Darlon) refused comment after aides in each of their offices brought to light a 'friendly game of numbers' between the two sector representatives.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Darlon''' was a celestial body<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Darlon system/Legends|Darlon system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Eucer sector/Legends|Eucer sector]].<ref name="EAOC Darlon" /> [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Jonas Wallen]], who represented a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]], hailed from Darlon.<ref name="HNN" />

For a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] leading up to the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4:11]], Wallen and their fellow Senator [[Char Bibbeck]] from<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Colunda">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Colunda Prime system/Legends|Colunda Prime system]]</ref> astronomical object [[Colunda Prime]] engaged in [[Gambling/Legends|betting]] on the likelihood of specific [[Planet/Legends|planets]] to either [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secede]] from the Republic or remain a part of that government. The gambling was eventually revealed to the public, and on 13:4:11 it was reported in an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Darlon was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 51|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #51]], a representation of an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[April 11]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN51 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6401165|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=MattPeriolat|date=2002-04-11|time=6:19 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Darlon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square R-7.<ref name="TEA" />
